stemHtml: When should a signalling lamp be provided and what colours should be produced?

options.a: At a controlled aerodrome and produce red, white and green.
options.b: At a controlled aerodrome and produce red, white, and amber.
options.c: At a uncontrolled aerodrome and produce red, white and green.
options.d: At a uncontrolled aerodrome and produce red, white and amber.
